tasks.label: Build: Build
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+1 - compile sketch
args: CLI='${config:arduino.cliPath}'; CLI="${CLI:-arduino-cli}"; FQBN='${config:arduino.fqbn}'; LIBS='${config:arduino.sketchbookPath}/libraries'; VERBOSE='${config:arduino.verbose}'; VFLAG=''; if [ "$VERBOSE" = "true" ]; then VFLAG='-v'; fi; $CLI compile --fqbn "$FQBN" --build-path '${workspaceFolder}/.build' --libraries "$LIBS" --build-property "compiler.cpp.extra_flags=-I '${workspaceFolder}'" --build-property "compiler.c.extra_flags=-I '${workspaceFolder}'" --warnings all $VFLAG '${workspaceFolder}'

tasks.label: Build: Build (Debug)
tasks.detail: Compile with debug symbols (auto-run by F5/Run)

tasks.label: Build: Upload
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+2 - start persistent monitor (if needed) + compile + upload
args: MONITOR='${workspaceFolder}/scripts/serial-persistent.py'; if ! pgrep -f "serial-persistent.py -m pico" >/dev/null 2>&1; then nohup python3 "$MONITOR" -m pico >/tmp/fiesta-persistent-monitor.log 2>&1 & fi; CLI='${config:arduino.cliPath}'; CLI="${CLI:-arduino-cli}"; FQBN='${config:arduino.fqbn}'; LIBS='${config:arduino.sketchbookPath}/libraries'; PORT='${config:arduino.uploadPort}'; VERBOSE='${config:arduino.verbose}'; VFLAG=''; if [ "$VERBOSE" = "true" ]; then VFLAG='-v'; fi; $CLI compile --fqbn "$FQBN" --build-path '${workspaceFolder}/.build' --libraries "$LIBS" --build-property "compiler.cpp.extra_flags=-I '${workspaceFolder}'" --build-property "compiler.c.extra_flags=-I '${workspaceFolder}'" --upload --port "$PORT" --warnings all $VFLAG '${workspaceFolder}'

tasks.label: Build: Upload (UF2 / BOOTSEL)
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+4 - compile + copy UF2 to BOOTSEL drive

tasks.label: Build: Monitor (persistent)
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+3 - waits for Pico (VID:PID), connects, then reconnects after unplug

tasks.label: Build: Monitor (Debug Probe)
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+5 - monitor for Raspberry Pi Debug Probe / Picoprobe

tasks.label: Build: Monitor (any port)
tasks.detail: Monitor any /dev/ttyACM* or /dev/ttyUSB* device

tasks.label: Build: Select board (GUI)
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+Alt+1 - quick selection from VS Code dropdown
args: SELECTION='${input:boardChoice}'; FQBN=$(echo "$SELECTION" | sed 's/ *-.*//'); FQBN=$(echo $FQBN | xargs); DESC=$(echo "$SELECTION" | sed 's/.*- *//'); echo "Setting board: $DESC"; echo "FQBN: $FQBN"; python3 -c "import json; f='${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/settings.json'; s=json.load(open(f)); s['arduino.fqbn']='$FQBN'; s['arduino.boardDescription']='$DESC'; json.dump(s,open(f,'w'),indent=4); print('\nOK: settings.json updated'); print('Run: Build: Refresh IntelliSense')"

tasks.label: Build: Select board (interactive)
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+Alt+2 - full menu with advanced options (flash, freq, USB, debug)

tasks.label: Build: Refresh IntelliSense
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+6 - compile project and generate c_cpp_properties.json

tasks.label: Build: Install library
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+0 - install library via arduino-cli

tasks.label: Build: Clean
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+7 - remove .build directory

tasks.label: Build: List ports
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+8 - list connected Arduino devices

tasks.label: Build: Change port
tasks.detail: Ctrl+Shift+9 - set upload port in settings.json
args: import json, sys; f = sys.argv[1]; port = sys.argv[2]; s = json.load(open(f)); s["arduino.uploadPort"] = port; json.dump(s, open(f, "w"), indent=4); print("Port set to: " + port)
